mapper.sql: ib.status = 1 and ib.expiration_time >= now() and (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) > 0
ib.status = 1 and ib.expiration_time >= current_timestamp() and (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) > 0

exists ( select 1 from inventory_batch ib_sellable where ib_sellable.product_id = p.id and ib_sellable.status = 1 and ib_sellable.expiration_time >= now() and (ib_sellable.stock_quantity - ib_sellable.locked_quantity - ib_sellable.sold_quantity) > 0 )

exists ( select 1 from inventory_batch ib_sellable where ib_sellable.product_id = p.id and ib_sellable.status = 1 and ib_sellable.expiration_time >= current_timestamp() and (ib_sellable.stock_quantity - ib_sellable.locked_quantity - ib_sellable.sold_quantity) > 0 )
mapper.select: select c.id, c.name, c.sort from category c where c.type = #{type} and c.status = 1 and exists ( select 1 from product p where p.category_id = c.id and p.status = 1 and ) order by c.sort asc, c.id asc

select count(1) from ( select p.id from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id left join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id
p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and
and p.name like concat('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%')
and p.category_id = #{criteria.categoryId}
group by p.id ) product_page_count

select count(1) from ( select p.id from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id left join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id
p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and
and p.name like concat('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%')
and p.category_id = #{criteria.categoryId}
group by p.id ) product_page_count
select id, min_days_to_expire as minDaysToExpire, max_days_to_expire as maxDaysToExpire, discount_rate as discountRate, priority from pricing_rule where status = 1 order by priority desc, id asc

select p.id, p.name, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.price, p.image, p.description, sum(case when then (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) else 0 end) as availableQuantity, ( select ib2.id from inventory_batch ib2 where ib2.product_id = p.id and ib2.status = 1 and ib2.expiration_time >= now() and (ib2.stock_quantity - ib2.locked_quantity - ib2.sold_quantity) > 0 order by ib2.expiration_time asc, ib2.id asc limit 1 ) as recommendedBatchId, ( select ib2.expiration_time from inventory_batch ib2 where ib2.product_id = p.id and ib2.status = 1 and ib2.expiration_time >= now() and (ib2.stock_quantity - ib2.locked_quantity - ib2.sold_quantity) > 0 order by ib2.expiration_time asc, ib2.id asc limit 1 ) as nearest_expiration_time from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id left join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and group by p.id, p.name, p.category_id, c.name, p.price, p.image, p.description

select p.id, p.name, p.category_id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, p.price, p.image, p.description, sum(case when then (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) else 0 end) as availableQuantity, ( select ib2.id from inventory_batch ib2 where ib2.product_id = p.id and ib2.status = 1 and ib2.expiration_time >= current_timestamp() and (ib2.stock_quantity - ib2.locked_quantity - ib2.sold_quantity) > 0 order by ib2.expiration_time asc, ib2.id asc limit 1 ) as recommendedBatchId, ( select ib2.expiration_time from inventory_batch ib2 where ib2.product_id = p.id and ib2.status = 1 and ib2.expiration_time >= current_timestamp() and (ib2.stock_quantity - ib2.locked_quantity - ib2.sold_quantity) > 0 order by ib2.expiration_time asc, ib2.id asc limit 1 ) as nearest_expiration_time from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id left join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and group by p.id, p.name, p.category_id, c.name, p.price, p.image, p.description
select name, value from product_spec where product_id = #{productId} order by id asc

select p.id as productId, ib.id as batchId, p.name as productName, p.image, p.price as listPrice, (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id inner join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and order by ib.expiration_time asc, ib.id asc limit 1

select p.id as productId, ib.id as batchId, p.name as productName, p.image, p.price as listPrice, (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id inner join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id where p.id = #{productId} and p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and order by ib.expiration_time asc, ib.id asc limit 1

select p.id as productId, ib.id as batchId, p.name as productName, p.image, p.price as listPrice, (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id inner join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id where p.id = #{productId} and ib.id = #{batchId} and p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and

select p.id as productId, ib.id as batchId, p.name as productName, p.image, p.price as listPrice, (ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity) as availableQuantity, ib.expiration_time as expirationTime from product p inner join category c on c.id = p.category_id inner join inventory_batch ib on ib.product_id = p.id where p.id = #{productId} and ib.id = #{batchId} and p.status = 1 and c.type = 1 and c.status = 1 and
